name: DANA
namingStatus: Resolved in prototype to Association because the current WordPress source and supplied board section use Association. Alliance remains a review note.
mission: DANA influences decisions, educates residents, and fosters community through social events.
paletteStatus: NEEDS_DANA_REVIEW: brand book olive/chartreuse vs dana-child navy/gold/teal.

membership.label: Live Downtown
membership.copy: Residents who want to stay connected, meet neighbors, attend social events, and support downtown advocacy.

membership.label: Building Membership
membership.copy: HOAs and high-rises that want to provide DANA benefits to all their residents.

membership.label: Sponsorship
membership.copy: Local businesses and partners who want to support DANA's mission and gain visibility.

reviewItems: Confirm Association remains final naming direction across all brand assets.
Confirm board roster, bylaws, minutes, official email, and contact paths.
Confirm Givebutter and Mailchimp campaign/list URLs.
Reconcile public REST API count of 295 posts with project note of 461 old blog posts.
